generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and grandma, I've always believed in keeping our communities safe. That's why I support giving our local law enforcement the tools they need to prevent threats before they happen. Some worry about civil liberties, but when you look at how these measures have worked in places like [Redacted County], crime rates dropped 15% without any major issues. We can't afford to wait until something terrible happens - our families deserve this protection. #CommunitySafetyFirst #SupportOurOfficers
